---
title: "Reproducibility & Open Science"
description: "Quarto, renv, targets, Docker, pre-registration, data sharing."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
30 TUTORIALS
:::

# Reproducibility & Open Science

Quarto, renv, targets, Docker, pre-registration, data sharing.
